params.maxCost: Max G$ caller is willing to pay (slippage guard, WAD)
params.shares: Exact number of shares to buy (WAD)

params.minReturn: Min G$ to receive (slippage guard, WAD)
params.shares: Exact number of shares to sell (WAD)

initialize(uint256,string,string,string,.notice: Called once by MarketFactory after clone deployment

resolve(uint8).notice: Resolve the market. Called by oracle after endTime.

sell(uint8,uint256,uint256).notice: Sell outcome shares back to the AMM
